Dataset: BRCA_METABRIC via cBioPortal Datasets ZIP

Primary endpoint: 5-year OS risk (60 months)

Secondary endpoint: full survival (T, E)

Label rules (as above, including IPCW sensitivity plan)

Planned subgroup axes for fairness auditing (e.g., age bands, ER/HER2 status, stage—depending on availability)

Leakage statement: no post-baseline covariates (METABRIC is largely baseline, but still state it)
